body: Re-review after developer pushed fixes for WaitSumSeconds, retryCount30d, and context.Background()

findings.description: Gap-fill goroutines inherit the parent collection cycle's deadline context. If main collection consumed most of the timeout budget, gap-fill fails silently and permanently consumes retry attempts (max 5 per namespace).
findings.remediation: Use a fresh context derived from context.Background() for gap-fill operations.

findings.description: coldStart field is read outside e.mu lock in runCollection. Multiple goroutines could observe stale values.
findings.remediation: Protect coldStart reads with e.mu.RLock() or use atomic.Bool.

findings.description: The cutoff comparison in Compute* methods uses <= while RecordObservation rejects dayOffset >= 30. Both boundaries consistently exclude day-30, creating a 29-day window instead of the documented 30-day SLO window.
findings.remediation: Change dayOffset >= 30 to dayOffset > 30 to include the 30th day.

findings.description: Metric label values from tenant-controlled Kubernetes labels could create cardinality pressure. Existing mitigations are substantial but a cardinality cap on unique label set combinations would add defense-in-depth.
findings.remediation: Add a cardinality cap on unique label set combinations per metric.

findings.description: scrapeDurationGauge.Set() is called outside e.mu.Unlock(), creating a potential data race on the gauge value.
findings.remediation: Move scrapeDurationGauge.Set() inside the locked section.
